events.title: Sunday Kirtan with Vasudev
events.description: Called Ubud's most-loved kirtan by the community that keeps showing up for it — Sayuri Healing Food's Sunday evening session with Vasudev is a weekly constant at the Peliatan venue. No ceremony scaffolding, no elaborate programme: just live voice, mantra, and a circle that's been meeting for years. Doors open at 6 PM, walk-in welcome.
events.short_description: Ubud's perennial Sunday kirtan at Sayuri Healing Food in Peliatan — live mantra with Vasudev, walk-in at 6 PM.
events.venue_address: Jl. Sukma Kesuma No. 2, Peliatan, Ubud, Bali

events.title: Kirtan: Mantra Medicine & Sacred Cacao
events.description: Sayuri Healing Food has quietly become one of Ubud's most-loved devotional anchors — their Thursday evening kirtan draws a community that treats mantra as medicine rather than performance. The format opens with sacred cacao and moves through a guided kirtan journey: Sanskrit call-and-response, collective voice, and the kind of presence only found in a room full of people who aren't performing. Founded by Sayuri Tanaka (raw food chef and BaliSpirit Festival presenter), the café at Jalan Sukma Kesuma in Peliatan has held this Thursday circle for years. Walk-in or contact the venue via Instagram.
events.short_description: Sayuri Healing Food's Thursday circle: sacred cacao opens the evening, Sanskrit mantra chanting carries it.
events.venue_address: Jl. Sukma Kesuma No. 2, Peliatan, Ubud, Bali

events.title: Eco Breathwork: Journey Through 7 Abundant Energies
events.description:
Date : Friday, May 30th

Time : 14:00pm - 16:30pm

Cost : 280K

Eco Breathwork is a guided, immersive experience to help you call abundance into your life. Move through 7 transformative energies—safety, creativity, confidence, love, expression, clarity, and connection—unlocking your natural capacity for joy, clarity, and emotional wellbeing. Gentle, supportive, and accessible for all levels.

What You Will Experience:

- A deep, immersive journey as each abundant energy awakens within you

- Moments of release, expansion, and lightness

- A growing sense of clarity, presence, and connection

- Sharing circle and group connection to enhance support

- Celebration of abundance as each energy is fully embodied, culminating in a circular dance through the 7 energies - Optional

Benefits:

- Release stress and emotional overwhelm

- Access creativity, confidence, and self-expression

- Strengthen nervous system regulation and clarity

- Deepen self-awareness and connection

- Embody the power of abundance in your life

Who Should Avoid:

- People with severe respiratory or cardiovascular conditions

- Those with acute psychological distress without support

About the Facilitator:

Romi Ochwani is a breathwork facilitator passionate about guiding people toward self-discovery and emotional release. With years of experience, Romi creates a safe, supportive space for participants to explore their inner energies and unlock abundance.

events.title: Ubud Temple Run
events.description:
Temple Run by Ubud Story Walks in collaboration with FAR Ubud Run Club

A 6.5 km run through the temples, landmarks, and village spaces that shape daily life in Ubud.

The route connects six sacred sites: Pura Desa, Pura Puseh, Pura Dalem, Pura Melanting, Pura Dugul, and Bale Timbang - at a relaxed, conversational pace (around 7–7:30 min/km). At each stop, guides from Ubud Story Walks share the meaning, history, and function behind the place: Balinese spatial concepts, village structure, subak culture, and the relationship between spirituality and everyday life.

Most runners pass these temples every week. But have no idea what they are running next to.

The format is a friendly run with storytelling stops: you run between temples, pause, listen, then move on. 

Easy enough to talk, comfortable enough to run, present enough to learn. 

Distance: 6.5 km

Pace: ~7–7:30 min/km

Duration: 90 minutes

Format: Social run with guided stops

Guided by: Ubud Story Walks

Supported by: FAR Ubud Run Club

Inclusions:

 ⁠⁠Welcome drink
 ⁠10% discount on post-run coffee and breakfast at Littletalks Cafe
 ⁠15% discount voucher for Ubud Story Walks experiences

Facilities:

 Toilet
 Motorcycle parking
 Bag drop station

Start & Finish Point:

Ubud Story Walks

Jl. Bisma No. 77, Ubud

events.title: SECRET COMEDY NIGHT - MAY 29TH (Live in Ubud) - 7.30PM  Show
events.description:
Hailed as "Southeast Asia's best stand-up comedy show", this hilarious 2 Man stand-up comedy takes place at an intimate venue in Ubud, Cok Rai Pudak area (Bali),

Secret Comedy Night has become a must-do cultural night out in Bali, often recommended by travelers looking for fun things to do in Bali at night. 

At Secret Comedy Night, it’s all about connection. Our comedians connect with the audience through laughter, jokes, and spontaneous crowd work, making the show feel intimate and interactive. 

Expect plenty of crowd interaction and improvised moments throughout the show.

Whether you're visiting or living in Bali, it’s an unforgettable way to experience live comedy, learn about new people, and enjoy a night full of laughter!

Doors open for registration at 6.30 PM. Show starts at 7.30 PM. 

Delicious food & drinks available for sale at the venue.

See you at the show!

IG: @SECRETCOMEDYNIGHT

CLICK HERE FOR FAQs

CLICK HERE FOR OUR GOOGLE REVIEW

CLICK HERE FOR ALL SECRET COMEDY TICKETS

If you have trouble purchasing online, contact at  WhatsApp at +6281227123366 or email at secretcomedybali@gmail.com. We’ll help you to book the tickets.

IMPORTANT NOTES:

 Tickets are non-refundable and cannot be rescheduled.
 This is a comedy show for adults (18+) and may include explicit language, plenty of dirty jokes, and adult humor (R-rated) that is not suitable for children or the easily offended, please consider this before attending.
 This show will include plenty of crowd work and improvised moments, please make sure crowd work is something you enjoy.
 No one under 18 will be admitted.
 We love and appreciate our audience, but heckling and/or disruptive behaviour is not tolerated at any of our shows.
 This show is filmed for social media content and parts of it are interactive with the audience (crowd work standup). By purchasing this ticket you agree to these terms.

events.title: FRENCH ARTISTRY, BALINESE SOUL: A TERROIR MASTERCLASS
events.description:
FRENCH ARTISTRY, BALINESE SOUL: A TERROIR MASTERCLASS

An Immersive Journey from Garden to Table with Chefs Victorien Bayet and Dwi Kurniawan 

Begin at our Permaculture Garden, where each ingredient is introduced at its source. Guided by Chefs Victorien Bayet and Dwi Kurniawan, this masterclass brings together refined French technique and locally sourced produce. Create a selection of appetizers and desserts in a hands-on session that highlights freshness, seasonality, and balance, supported by our farmers and fishermen. The experience continues at Kokokan Restaurant, where live music accompanies the evening ambiance during Kokokan Apéritif and Sunset Melody.

IDR 775,000 net per person

Available on 29 May 2026 

4.00pm - 6.00pm at Permaculture Garden and Kokokan Restaurant

events.title: Kundalini Activation & Sound Healing
events.description:
Kundalini Activation & Sound Healing

Step into a sanctuary of peace and reconnect with your essence. Join us for a transformative journey designed to help you Connect with your Heart space, release stagnant emotions, and feel Bliss. Set against the lush, tropical backdrop of Ubud, this afternoon is dedicated to your healing and inner harmony.

💫 During this session, you will receive a direct transmission of Kundalini energy: your innate, divine and healing life force, activating deep transformation in your body and nervous system for powerful emotional and spiritual healing.

This awakening clears energetic blockages, balances your energy centers, boosts confidence, enhances vitality, and often leads to growth in areas like finances and relationships, while fostering a lasting sense of inner peace, harmony, and joy.

😌 Then, you will receive a healing sound journey, an immersive bath of sound washing through every cell, dissolving what no longer serves you and anchoring the new light you've called in. You will leave feeling held, renewed, and deeply at home in yourself.

 

✨ Benefits of the session:

- Release emotional, energetic and spiritual blockages, limiting beliefs and stored trauma

- Experience deep relaxation, bliss, inner remembrance and stress relief

- Align with your soul’s path, life purpose and authentic self

- Awaken and embody your highest potential

✨ How to prepare:

- Dress Comfortably: Wear comfortable clothing.

- Eat Light: A lighter stomach enhances sensitivity to the practice. Recommendation to fast or not eat for 3h before the session.

- Hydrate: Drink water before and after the session.

- Avoid Stimulants: like coffee, alcohol and other mind-altering substances, the day of the session and if possible 24h prior.

- Disconnect: Take a break from news, social media, and avoid conflicts.

- Open Your Heart & Surrender: Come with an open mind, let go and allow the energy to transmute what doesn’t serve you anymore.

🧘🏽‍♀️ Your facilitators:

You will be led through a powerful transmission of Life force energy followed by the restorative vibrations of a Sound Healing session, guided by 2 facilitators:

- Houda: Kundalini Activation Facilitator, Cacao ceremonialist & Yoga teacher

- Antonella: Sound healer and Life coach

📅 Event Details

Date: Friday, 29 May

Time: 4-6pm

Ready to feel the bliss?

🌀 Book your spot now!

Invite a friend or share with someone who needs this space

events.title: Biosonic Studio Ubud · Soft Opening
events.description:
Biosonic Studio Ubud is opening its doors for the very first time — and you're warmly invited.

This is a free, relaxed open house for anyone curious about vibroacoustic therapy, sound healing, or simply wanting to experience something new in Ubud. Come as you are, stay as long as you like, and flow between two spaces just up the road from each other.

What's on:

🛏 Complimentary 15-minute vibroacoustic bed sessions at Biosonic Studio — lie down, close your eyes, and let the sound frequencies do their work through the body. No experience needed.

🎙 Two intimate talks — The Birth of Biosonic — with founder Marlia Coeur, sharing the vision, the science, and the story behind why this studio exists. Catch either the afternoon or evening session.

🌿 A showcase of PYTHIA anointing serums and AETHERIA goddess-wear from HEKATE Boutique.

🥂 Drinks and light refreshments

Schedule: 3:00 pm — Doors open, free flow begins ~ 4:00 pm — Talk: The Birth of Biosonic Q&A · Konekt Café ~ 6:00 pm — Talk: The Birth of Biosonic Q&A · Konekt Café 7:00 pm — Close Continue sessions at studio until 9:00pm

Where: Biosonic Studio Ubud & Konekt Café, Jl Nyuh Bulan Nyuh Kuning (same street as Sage restaurant)

Ticket price: Free RSVP requested so we know how many people to expect — and to send you updates closer to the date.

We can't wait to share this with you. 🙏

events.title: LOVE LIFE: A playful, honest & deeply transformative workshop for women
events.description:
Date : Friday, May 29th

Time : 14:00pm - 16:30pm

Cost : 280K

Let’s be real.

If love were simple, you wouldn’t be reading this.

Your love life isn’t random.

It’s patterned.

And yes… it’s trying to teach you something.

How is your love life?

Love Life is a workshop for brave self-inquiry, heart-connection practices, guided self-reflection, conscious writing, gentle embodiment, and shared witnessing. A space to explore patterns, desires, and truths—and to redefine what love means to you, now. 

In this space, we explore:

* Why you keep attracting the same type (even when you swear you’re “done with that”)

* The energetic dance between feminine & masculine

* What women expect from men—and how those expectations shape outcomes

* Sacred responsibility in love (the part no one wants to claim)

* Shadow, attachment & emotional availability

* Sacred sexuality, polarity & desire

* How to stop chasing love and start calling it in

What You’ll Leave With

* Greater clarity around your relationship patterns

* A deeper understanding of your needs, boundaries & desires

* Tools to relate from self-responsibility instead of self-abandonment

* More emotional and energetic maturity in love

* The ability to recognise aligned vs unavailable partners early

* A grounded understanding of men—without losing yourself

* A stronger sense of self-worth that doesn’t depend on being chosen

* A clearer, calmer way to call in conscious love

This isn’t about fixing yourself.

It’s about becoming honest enough to choose differently.

There will be laughter.

There may be uncomfortable truths.

And yes—this is serious business, because love touches everything.

For women who are ready to:

– Break old relationship cycles

– Stop overgiving and underreceiving

– Experience deeper intimacy and polarity

– Create a love life that actually feels alive

Come curious.

Come open.

Come willing to meet yourself in love.

Love is sacred.

And it deserves your attention.

What You’ll Leave With

* Clearer awareness of why you keep choosing that dynamic

* The ability to self-enquire instead of overgiving or self-abandoning

* Stronger boundaries and a clearer sense of what you actually want

* More emotional maturity (without shutting your heart down)

* Clarity on the kind of love you’re truly available for

events.title: Resonanz Ecstatic Dance  X  PRABUMI
events.description:
RESONANZ - (ECSTATIC DANCE)

Movement. Music. Freedom. Devotion.

Thursday, 28th MAY 2026

18:00 till 20:45

📍 Paradiso Ubud

Tickets: www.megatix.co.id/resonanz

Location: https://goo.gl/maps/7Fhjr9K768ATLAua7

150K IDR ONLINE - 200K IDR AT THE DOOR – Limited to 50 people

RESONANZ is a weekly Contact to Ecstatic Dance in the center of Ubud —

Intimate, casual, and dance-focused, with an emphasis on quality music and sound.

This Week’s Curator: PRABUMI

Prabumi is a collaborative effort initiated by Muktito Adhitya, an electronic music producer and musician. He began his career at a young age, composing music as early as 7 years old. Over time, Muktito became increasingly drawn to exploring life through travel and immersion in nature. He developed a deep fascination and appreciation for the sounds of nature and felt compelled to preserve them through the medium of music, harnessing the harmonious melodies and harmonies they offer. Prabumi represents one of Muktito's most recent explorations into music, incorporating the sounds of nature, traditional world music instruments, and the earth itself. Guided by his passion and intuition, Muktito has masterfully fused these organic elements into a rich tapestry of dynamic music, imbued with the beauty of nature's own symphonies.

Schedule

18:00 — Contact Jam (open to all, no experience needed)

19:00 — Resonanz Ecstatic Dance

20:30 — Sonic Savasana (ends by 20:45)

Community Agreements

✦ No talking / No phones

✦ Drug & alcohol-free space

✦ Respect others’ space — eye contact = clear “yes”

Congregating every Thursday at 18:00

Pre-book: www.megatix.co.id/resonanz

events.title: Grand Opening of MĀUA Olea Ubud
events.description:
MĀUA Olea UbudCordially Invites You to the

GRAND OPENING

Discreetly set back from the main road, MĀUA Olea Ubud offers an elegant sanctuary while remaining within easy reach of Ubud’s most iconic attractions Sacred Monkey Forest, Ubud Art Market, and Saraswati Temple, balancing serenity with prime location.

Each private pool villa blends Balinese architectural heritage with contemporary comfort, creating a seamless sense of cultural immersion and refined seclusion. From the moment of arrival, guests are welcomed through a sensory experience of natural stone, warm teakwood, soft-spoken service, and subtle notes of cendana and citrus.

Surrounded by lush greenery and misty horizon views, MĀUA Olea Ubud is a distinctive eco-luxury retreat where sustainability, authenticity, and five-star hospitality come together designed for privacy, romance, and meaningful connection.

Date

28th  May 2026

Time

4.30 - 7 PM

Venue

MĀUA Olea Ubud at Jl. Legong Lasem No.1, Mas - Pengosekan, Ubud, Gianyar 

Join us for an afternoon of curated hospitality and celebration.

We look forward to welcoming you.

RSVP : Lieke - 0811 8381 789

events.title: FLAVOURS AND RHYTHMS OF BALI
events.description:
FLAVOURS AND RHYTHMS OF BALI

Culture, Cuisine and Community Beneath the Ubud Sky

Every Thursday evening, discover the warmth of Balinese hospitality at Kelapa Poolside Restaurant and Bar.

Experience an enchanting cultural dinner featuring authentic Balinese flavours, graceful traditional dances performed by the local villagers of Tanggayuda, and the soulful sounds of live mini gamelan music presented by the village’s talented community artists.

Indulge in a thoughtfully curated semi buffet experience where traditional appetizers and Balinese desserts are beautifully displayed on wooden buffet carts, while our signature Nasi Campur Kappa is served directly to your table, offering a generous selection of authentic Balinese specialties accompanied by mixed satay.

Surrounded by lush greenery and the tranquil atmosphere of Kelapa Poolside Restaurant and Bar, this weekly celebration invites you to experience the true spirit of Bali through its people, culture and culinary heritage. A soulful journey into the heart of Bali

A soulful journey into the heart of Bali

IDR 600,000++ per person

Surcharge from prevailing meal package at IDR 300,000++ per person

At Kelapa Poolside Restaurant and Bar

Live Balinese Dance and Mini Gamelan Performance Semi Buffet Balinese Dinner Experience

Balinese Performance from 7.00pm - 8.00pm

Dinner from 7.00pm onwards
